overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rainy urban alley and sidewalk in a video game environment (resembling GTA V). The camera moves through narrow passages between buildings, past dumpsters and exterior stairs, eventually following a bald character in a purple shirt along a wet sidewalk illuminated by streetlights.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow wet alley at night, with rain falling and streetlights reflecting off the asphalt. The camera moves forward between concrete building walls, passing black dumpsters on the right, then turns right at the corner into a narrower passage.

segments.scene_description: Moving along the side of a concrete building, the camera passes a blue dumpster and metal exterior stairs on the left. The narrow passage is wet from rain, with a white wooden fence visible ahead on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside street with parked motorcycle

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up slightly as the camera moves along the sidewalk, revealing a parked motorcycle on the right and distant city buildings ahead. The white fence moves closer on the right while the building wall continues on the left, with rain creating reflections on the wet pavement.

segments.scene_description: A bald character in a purple shirt enters the frame from the right, and the camera follows him as he walks down the sidewalk. The white fence and building wall pass behind as the camera moves past them, with the motorcycle now visible in the distance on the right and city lights ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban alleyway that gradually opens onto a wet city sidewalk. It begins by gliding forward through a narrow passage between concrete walls, passing black dumpsters as the camera turns a corner into an even tighter corridor. As the movement continues along the side of a building, the camera passes a blue dumpster and metal exterior stairs before the space begins to expand toward a white wooden fence. The scene then opens up to reveal a parked motorcycle and distant city buildings, with rain-slicked pavement reflecting the surrounding lights. Finally, a bald character in a purple shirt enters the frame from the right, and the camera follows him as he walks away from the alley and toward the glowing city skyline.
